nasb.text: At the same time too, he was hoping that money would be given him by Paul; therefore he also used to send for him quite often and converse with him.

esv.text: At the same time he hoped that money would be given him by Paul. So he sent for him often and conversed with him.

cnv.text: 同時他也希望保羅送錢給他，所以又多次傳見他，和他談話。

ccb.text: 腓利斯希望保罗贿赂他，所以经常召他来谈话。

csbs.text: 同时他也希望保罗送他钱，所以经常把他叫来，和他交谈。
